subcodes.first_line: O baker full of need! His Holiness the Spirit said unto His disciples: "I am the bread which hath come down from heaven; whoso eateth..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خباز پرنیاز حضرت روح بحواریین میفرماید انا خبز الذی نزل من السماء من اکل
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
